subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Wronged One to him who hath believed in God, when the Promised One came with manifest sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله اذ اتی الموعود بسلطان مبین امروز
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @chastisement and requital, @Word of God is its own standard, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
